content:
<USER_REQUEST>
Write these complete Azure Functions backend files for the Srilatha Art app. The backend uses Azure Functions Node.js v4 model with TypeScript. Use the existing `backend/src/utils/tableStorage.ts` utility.

IMPORTANT design decisions:
- Azure Table Storage for data (no Cosmos DB, no SQL)
- Node.js v4 programming model (`app.http()` registration style)
- All functions export from a single entry point or use individual files
- Validate input with basic checks
- Return proper CORS headers

First, READ the existing file at: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\utils\tableStorage.ts
Also READ: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\package.json

---

## FILE 1: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\functions\orders.ts

Azure Function — Orders CRUD.

```ts
import { app, HttpRequest, HttpResponseInit, InvocationContext } from '@azure/functions';
```

Endpoints:
- `POST /api/orders` — Create order. Body: `{ customerName, email, phone, address, items: [{productId, name, qty, price}], total, couponCode?, paymentId }`. Validate required fields. Save to Azure Table Storage (table: 'orders', partitionKey: 'order', rowKey: `SA-${Date.now()}`). Send WhatsApp notification by calling a helper function. Return `{ orderId, message }`.
- `GET /api/orders` — List orders (admin). Query params: `status`, `page` (default 1), `limit` (default 20). Requires `Authorization: Bearer {ADMIN_SECRET}` header. Return paginated orders.
- `GET /api/orders/{id}` — Get single order. Admin only.
- `PATCH /api/orders/{id}` — Update order status. Admin only. Body: `{ status: 'pending'|'processing'|'shipped'|'delivered'|'cancelled', trackingNumber? }`. On status change to 'shipped', trigger WhatsApp notification to customer.

Order entity shape:
```ts
interface OrderEntity extends TableEntity {
  orderId: string;
  customerName: string;
  email: string;
  phone: string;
  address: string;
  itemsJson: string; // JSON.stringify(items)
  total: number;
  couponCode: string;
  paymentId: string;
  status: string;
  trackingNumber?: string;
  createdAt: string;
}
```

---

## FILE 2: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\functions\whatsapp.ts

Azure Function — WhatsApp notification sender using WhatsApp Cloud API.

```ts
import { app, HttpRequest, HttpResponseInit, InvocationContext } from '@azure/functions';
```

Endpoints:
- `POST /api/whatsapp/send` — Send WhatsApp message. Admin only. Body: `{ to, message }`. Uses `WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID` env vars. Calls Meta Graph API.

Also export a helper function `sendWhatsApp(to: string, message: string): Promise<void>` that other functions can import:
```ts
export async function sendWhatsApp(to: string, message: string): Promise<void> {
  const url = `https://graph.facebook.com/v17.0/${process.env.WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID}/messages`;
  const body = {
    messaging_product: 'whatsapp',
    to: to.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''),
    type: 'text',
    text: { body: message },
  };
  const res = await fetch(url, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}`,
       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  });
  if (!res.ok) {
    const err = await res.text();
    throw new Error(`WhatsApp API error: ${err}`);
  }
}
```

Order notification message template:
```
🎨 *New Order - Srilatha Art*

Order ID: {orderId}
Customer: {name}
Phone: {phone}
Items: {items list}
Total: ₹{total}
Address: {address}

Please confirm and begin processing!
```

Shipping notification template:
```
Hi {name}! 🎨

Your Srilatha Art order #{orderId} has been shipped!
Tracking: {trackingNumber}

Expected delivery: 3-5 business days.
Questions? Reply to this message!
```

---

## FILE 3: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\functions\razorpay-webhook.ts

Azure Function — Razorpay payment webhook.

```ts
import { app, HttpRequest, HttpResponseInit, InvocationContext } from '@azure/functions';
import crypto from 'crypto';
```

Endpoint: `POST /api/webhooks/razorpay`

Logic:
1. Read raw body as text
2. Verify HMAC-SHA256 signature: `crypto.createHmac('sha256', process.env.RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET!).update(rawBody).digest('hex')` should equal the `X-Razorpay-Signature` header
3. If verification fails, return 400
4. Parse JSON body
5. Handle `payment.captured` event: update order status to 'processing', send WhatsApp confirmation to customer
6. Handle `payment.failed` event: log failure
7. Return 200 `{ received: true }`

---

## FILE 4: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\functions\products.ts

Azure Function — Products API.

Endpoints:
- `GET /api/products` — List all products. Reads from Table Storage (table: 'products'). Query params: `category`, `sort`. Returns array.
- `GET /api/products/{slug}` — Get single product by slug.
- `POST /api/products` — Create product. Admin only.
- `PATCH /api/products/{slug}` — Update product. Admin only. (e.g., toggle inStock)
- `DELETE /api/products/{slug}` — Delete product. Admin only.

Product entity uses slug as rowKey, category as partitionKey.

---

## FILE 5: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\functions\custom-orders.ts

Azure Function — Custom order requests.

Endpoints:
- `POST /api/custom-orders` — Submit custom order request. Body: `{ name, email, phone, description, size?, budget?, referenceImageUrl? }`. Save to Table Storage. Send WhatsApp notification to Srilatha. Return `{ requestId, message }`.
- `GET /api/custom-orders` — List all (admin only).

WhatsApp notification:
```
🎨 *New Custom Order Request*

Name: {name}
Phone: {phone}
Email: {email}
Description: {description}
Budget: {budget}

Reply to discuss!
```

---

## FILE 6: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\local.settings.json

```json
{
  "IsEncrypted": false,
  "Values": {
    "AzureWebJobsStorage": "UseDevelopmentStorage=true",
    "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME": "node",
    "AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING": "",
    "WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN": "",
    "WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID": "",
    "WHATSAPP_WABA_ID": "",
    "RAZORPAY_KEY_ID": "",
    "RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET": "",
    "RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET": "",
    "ADMIN_SECRET": "srilatha_admin_2025",
    "ADMIN_PASSWORD": "srilatha2025"
  }
}
```

## FILE 7: C:\repos\srilatha.art.v2\backend\src\index.ts

Main entry point that imports all function registrations:
```ts
import './functions/orders';
import './functions/whatsapp';
import './functions/razorpay-webhook';
import './functions/products';
import './functions/custom-orders';
```

Report back all file paths when done.
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-15T07:07:16+05:30.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
